label: Random gen step selector option
description: A weighted option for GenStep_RandomSelector. Exactly one of def or genStep should be set.

def.label: Def
def.description: GenStepDef whose genStep field is executed when this option is chosen.

genStep.label: Gen step
genStep.description: Inline polymorphic gen step executed when this option is chosen.

weight.label: Weight
weight.description: Relative probability of this option being chosen.
